OrderingPolicy.description: An ordering policy a node declares support for (design-note 2). The runner's dispatch honors the flow's per-node choice among the node's declared set; the node itself stays a pure function under all three.

oneOf.description: Total order: one in-flight execution per node.
Order per partition key, parallel across keys (the Kafka model).
Free parallelism up to the concurrency limit.

config-schema.description: JSON Schema for the node's `config`; the runner validates config against it BEFORE dispatch. Absent = any config accepted.

contract.description: The `wamn:node` contract version the component was built against (e.g. "0.1.0"). The runner instantiates against it and supports current + previous major (versioning policy, design notes).

input-schema.description: JSON Schema for the input payload (editor assistance / 11.5 checks).

name.description: Display name for the editor palette.

node-type.description: The flow-graph node `type` this component implements — a lowercase slug (`[a-z0-9-]`, alphanumeric first/last), the flow-id rule.

ordering.description: Ordering policies the node supports. Default: all three.

output-ports.description: Output ports the node can emit (edge affordances in the editor). Default `["main"]`. `"error"` is reserved for the engine's error routing and never emitted by a node.

output-schema.description: JSON Schema for the output payload.

schema-version.description: Manifest schema version ("0.1"); 0.1.x admits additive changes only.

version.description: The node's own version (mirrors its OCI tag).
